prompt: A surreal, minimalist architectural diptych. Left panel: A close-up of a marble staircase ascending sharply into bright light. Right panel: A wide-angle view of dozens of identical small staircases floating in a void; while every individual staircase clearly angles upward, they are stepped downward in a massive, staggered formation, creating a global pathway that leads into a dark, foggy abyss. No text, no numbers, no people. Impossible Euclidean geometry, Escher-style lighting, high contrast, uncanny atmosphere. --ar 16:9 --v 6.1
visual_logic: Individual staircases slope upward (subgroup trend), but their collective staggered arrangement creates a continuous downward trajectory (aggregate reversal). The diptych contrasts the local truth against the global reality.
